title: Work decomposition — agent brief manifest
description: The structural truth a decomposition must satisfy. Briefs are change-nodes (see schemas/change-node.schema.json v1.0.0) with work-decomposition-specific fields (kind, test_plan, agent_brief, risk). Per-object shape is validated by JSON-Schema; cross-brief properties (acyclic deps, id uniqueness, coverage, path bounds) are enforced by validate_decomposition.py.

coverage_note.description: How the briefs together fully cover the proposal — the completeness claim the adversarial review will attack.

briefs.description: Array of change-node briefs (see schemas/change-node.schema.json). Each brief is an independently-shippable piece of work.

id.description: Unique lowercase hyphenated identifier; matches change-node.schema.json.

goal.description: What 'done' looks like, in the reviewer's terms; matches change-node.schema.json.

scope.description: File/dir globs this brief may touch — the write boundary; matches change-node.schema.json.

depends_on.description: ids of briefs that must land first; matches change-node.schema.json.

test_plan.description: How it's verified: which flow fixture / go test / manual check.

agent_brief.description: The self-contained prompt handed to the implementer agent.
